name: Marco Rubio
subject: How to outrage the media, repeatedly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46121694:6qPhIHrNo:m:1:1349778030:AF38D96D6F434FF414C303279B10CD30:r)
---
| | | | Peter, I went into Saturday night's debate -- like I've approached this whole election -- with one clear goal: Make it about my vision for America, and the importance of undoing the damage President Obama has done to our country. So I pointed out a few times that President Obama has been very deliberate about achieving his bad policies -- they're no accident; he's really trying to change this country for the worse. And then the media pounced. They know our campaign is building momentum, and they are desperate to defend Obama's legacy. They're not going to succeed, of course, but **[I will need your help to fight back.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46121694:6qPhIHrNo:m:1:1349778030:AF38D96D6F434FF414C303279B10CD30:r)** I don't care how much it outrages the media, I'm going to keep saying it: Barack Obama is trying to change the United States of America. This isn't the first time the media has tried to distract people from the real stakes of this election -- and criticism of their hero, President Obama. In the past, they've tried to make stories out of the fact that I once bought a boat, or got some traffic tickets once upon a time. I know Americans want something different -- they're tired of President Obama's attempts to make America more like other countries, they want a leader with new ideas, and they don't want to hear about silly media narratives or petty attacks from my opponents. If you agree, and you want to see this election be about real issues and ideas, rather than whatever narrative the media is trying to throw together to take me down, **[go here to make an immediate, secure donation to my campaign right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46121694:6qPhIHrNo:m:1:1349778030:AF38D96D6F434FF414C303279B10CD30:r)** We can't afford to let the media get away with this. This election is too important for that. This election needs to be about who will be able to take back the White House for conservatives, and who has the ideas and the vision to build a New American Century. I know I'm that candidate. And you know what? The media knows it too -- that's why they're trying to make this election about something else, because they know I'll be able to beat their candidate: Hillary Clinton. I'm going stay focused on my 21st Century ideas for America. [**I hope you 'll support me right now as we head into the most intense stretch of this campaign yet.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46121694:6qPhIHrNo:m:1:1349778030:AF38D96D6F434FF414C303279B10CD30:r) The media isn't going to stop going after me -- and I'm not going to stop telling the truth about our President. Sincerely, Marco Rubio

name: Tyler Foote
subject: Your doctor
body:
Peter, Many medical professionals, possibly including your doctor, want to offer more services to patients.
---
| | |
---
| | |
---|---|---
| | Hey Peter,Many medical professionals, possibly including your doctor, want to offer more services to patients. These include MRI and x-rays, which they currently have to refer to other offices. Imagine how much time and money could be saved if you could get x-rays in-house? They could start offering these services - if your lawmakers vote for HB 193 and reform a monopolistic regulation known as "Certificate of Public Need". **[Contact your lawmaker today and let's end this broken system!
](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=f75b43abb7ab6ec9e03f7f92712b2e3f0235d8b189de46b9de79a58cd2e0b4fe4a647ffc382904e9 "Contact your lawmaker today and let's end this broken system!")**[ ](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=f75b43abb7ab6ec9fdf0cf42d5284dc6fb5d17ca3945daf4a52b542d4b7e7e93ff45d585f0dbf7e2)The "Certificate of Public Need" (COPN) regulations are all about protecting special interests at the expense of patients and entrepreneurial doctors. They let a few distant bureaucrats and big hospitals decide who gets to offer new services to patients in the state. Of course, they often say NO to doctors who want to do more. _Principled members of the state legislature are working hard to pass a bill, HB 193 that will phase out most COPN laws._ The legislature will vote on it this week. [Email your lawmaker today in support of HB 193 and passing COPN reform.](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=f75b43abb7ab6ec95e4ef0a5c8bf364ed48ecadf8c8f72de2cccd6fd0a4fb67eda2a753ed3257565 "Will you email your lawmaker today in support of COPN repeal?")Lobbyists for the big hospitals are doing everything they can to kill this bill and keep your doctor from offering more services. Fortunately, we have truth and grassroots leadership on our side. We can win.Thanks for fighting for the Commonwealth! Tyler Foote
State Director
Americans for Prosperity-Virginia P.S. Did you know Virginia has the 11th worst Certificate of Public Need regulations in the nation? Compared to states without these absurd laws, the Commonwealth has 10,800 fewer hospital beds. [Let's fight for more choice and competition in healthcare.](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=f75b43abb7ab6ec92e7b19993a74bad09d9d69d1ef2d53e10f7a1d14dcde1f9fe594fcbb4fe178f2 "Let's fight for more choice and competition in healthcare. ")********************** ******

name: Rick Santorum
subject: Why Marco
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| Friend,

This past week has been a big transition for me and my family: No more campaign trail, a lot more carpooling our children to school. I want a better, stronger, safer America for my children, but every day we hear about the looming threats from ISIS and Iran’s nuclear ambitions. I could not just exit the presidential race -- I needed to stand with the one candidate who understands the threat of radical Islam and has the plan to defeat them. [**That is why I am asking you to join me in supporting the leader I believe will lead us into a New American Century: Marco Rubio.**](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fmarcorubio.com%2Fstand-with-marco-and-rick-santorum%2F&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rubio&n=1) While many on the Republican debate stage Saturday night said all the right things, only Marco Rubio showed he understands the threat of radical Islam. I know Marco Rubio and Marco Rubio knows who our enemy is, what their goals are, and has a plan to defeat them. **[If that sounds like the candidate you want right now, go here to make an immediate, secure donation.](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fmarcorubio.com%2Fstand-with-marco-and-rick-santorum%2F&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rubio&n=2)** Marco Rubio understands that to defeat ISIS, we need to delegitimize the caliphate they have created. Marco knows that ISIS derives its power by holding land and that the only way to defeat them is to take it back. He knows that we cannot pit Sunni versus Shiite, and that we must partner with our allies in the region to defeat this enemy. And you know how passionate I am about ensuring Iran never develops a nuclear weapon, and you know how frustrated I was when Barack Obama tore up the sanctions we fought so hard to impose. As President, Marco Rubio will make sure the Iranian leaders are forced to chose between having a nuclear weapon and having an economy. Marco will work to impose tougher sanctions on Iran to stop their nuclear ambitions in their tracks! **[>>> CHIP IN $15 NOW <<<](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fmarcorubio.com%2Fstand-with-marco-and-rick-santorum%2F&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rubio&n=3)** I trust Marco because he has the track-record to back up his rhetoric. He authored tough sanctions against radical groups like Hezbollah. Marco is not afraid to define our enemy, confront our enemy, and defeat our enemy. Marco Rubio is a born leader for America! I do not take endorsements lightly, but for me this choice was easy: Last night, Marco reaffirmed for me that understands the unique national security threats facing our nation. There is no candidate in this race who has shown better judgment or has a better understanding of these challenges than Marco Rubio. Period. Commander-in-Chief is not an entry-level position and Marco Rubio is the one candidate for President who is ready to lead on day-one! While many on the Republican debate stage Saturday night said all the right things, only Marco Rubio showed he understands the threat of radical Islam. Marco knows that ISIS derives its power by holding land and that the only way to defeat them is to take it back. He knows that we cannot pit Sunni versus Shiite, and that we must partner with our allies in the region to defeat this enemy. As President, Marco Rubio will make sure the Iranian leaders are forced to chose between having a nuclear weapon and having an economy. name: Chris Christie
subject: Experience Matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Peter - We are now less than 24 hours to the polls opening in New Hampshire and as everyone prepares to make their choice, I want you to remember one thing: **experience matters.**
It matters because we've all seen the result of electing a first term Senator whose only executive experience has been managing their 30 person staff. They simply don't have the experience.
Peter, do we really want to take that risk for our country AGAIN?
**We need a candidate** who knows what they're doing.
**We need a candidate** who has had the experience and responsibility of making real, consequential decisions.
**We need a candidate** who will answer the questions from the people he represents and the press in an unguarded way.
**We need a candidate** who will do more to answer your questions than hold a quick 45 minute drive by town hall meeting.
**And we need a candidate** who will run towards - not away from - the challenges and the responsibilities to make the big decisions that need to be made.

**I am that candidate. I not only have the strength, experience, and resolve to beat Hillary Clinton in November, but I also have what it takes to lead this country for you.**
I can't be your candidate or your leader without your support. **[If you can, please donate $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can to my campaign now to ensure we have the full resources to continue talking directly to voters about my experience](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46129316:6dEEnHrNw:m:1:1516426255:DF402A378E043D52DC061B8650CEFC1B:r)**.
I appreciate your time and thank you for your support.
Chris

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Eight years from now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2016
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
I want you to imagine eight years from now:
The minimum wage is a living wage and students are graduating college without the crushing debt stifling their ability to pursue the career of their dreams.
Health care is recognized as a right for every man, woman, and child, and the United States is leading the world in fighting climate change.
There is no bank that is too big to fail, no banker too powerful to jail, and we've leveled the playing field so that the billionaire class is no longer able to buy and sell our candidates and elections.
**When that happens, they will say it all startedtomorrow night in New Hampshire** where we have overcome not just a forty point deficit in the polls, but the sneers of the corporate media and opposition from political elites and billionaire super PACs.
But we still have work to do. More than 3.5 million individual contributions have helped power us to a slight lead in New Hampshire. But if we're going to hold on and win tomorrow night, there's one more that we desperately need: yours.
[**Contribute $3 to our campaign before tomorrow night 's New Hampshire primary -- it could mean the narrow margin between victory and defeat for our political revolution.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/-imagine?amount=27&refcode=em160208full-nd "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/-imagine?amount=27&refcode=em160208full-nd")
What we are doing on this campaign is building a political revolution large enough and powerful enough to take this country back from the billionaire class, and we are hopeful that tomorrow night will be a turning point for our movement.
Years from now, when you are looking back on everything we've accomplished together, I want you to be able to say your contribution helped us win in New Hampshire.
**Make your $3 contribution right now:**
[**https://go.berniesanders.com/imagine**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/-imagine?amount=27&refcode=em160208full-nd "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/-imagine?amount=27&refcode=em160208full-nd")
If we win tomorrow night, our victory will send a message, loudly and clearly, that "ENOUGH is ENOUGH!" This great nation and its government belong to all of the people, and not a handful of billionaires and their super PACs.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
* * *

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Before I go to bed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46130323:6jyb9HrNz:m:1:1349778030:3A5CECC949083D42C855E44C8FD05973:r)
---
| | | | Peter, Tomorrow is the New Hampshire primary. It's hard to believe that this day we have been working towards for months is finally here. Peter, before I go to sleep for a few hours, I wanted to send you a note to just say thank you. **Thank you for being a committed supporter and a loyal friend. Thank you for standing by our campaign even when the going got tough. Thank you for your commitment to restoring our nation.** This election has not always been easy, and I know the road ahead won't be either. But I know that the things worth fighting for aren't always easy, and that's why I'm dedicated to this campaign and our conservative message. No matter what is thrown our way or what the media says about our campaign, I will never waver from our values and beliefs. And I will always remember -- focused as I am right now on winning -- that my most important job will always be as a husband and father, and that the goal of all our lives is eternity, not some political fight. Even in the most intense moments, you can always count on me to remember that. I hope I can continue to count on your support -- tomorrow is a big day.
Marco

body:
Peter --

Do you want to vote for Mr. Trump?
**ACT TODAY!**
In Virginia today is the last day to register to vote in the March 1st Primary.
**Who should Register:**
\- 18 years or older on Nov. 8, 2016
\- US Citizen
\- Virginia Resident
\- Not a felon (unless rights have been restored)
**Who should Update their Registration:**
\- Anyone who has moved since the last time they voted
\- College students who want to vote at school instead of at home
**How to Register/Update:

**
Register: [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/Registration/Eligibility](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fvote.elections.virginia.gov%2FRegistration%2FEligibility&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=va_voter_reg&n=1)
Update Registration: [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fvote.elections.virginia.gov%2FVoterInformation&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=va_voter_reg&n=2)
Do not delay! All forms are due to the local elections office (sometimes found at the DMV) before they close for business TODAY, Monday, February 8, 2016.
**Important Notes**
**Republican?**
While Donald Trump is running in the Republican Primary, the election is open to ALL voters. Independent, Libertarian, Democratic and Republican Voters only need to request a Republican Ballot to vote for Donald Trump.
**Sign an Oath?**
There is NO Republican Pledge to vote. You will NOT need to sign any statement of affiliation or loyalty oath. This has been repealed.
**17 Years Old?**
If a 17-year-old will turn 18 on or before November 8th, 2016, they MUST register to vote today to vote in the Primary. In Virginia anyone who will be 18 before the next general election can vote in the primary, if they are registered.
**Questions or Concerns?**
Call the Department of Elections at (804) 864-8901.

Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.

---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=va_voter_reg&n=3).
